system.Text:
__When your companion faces physical hardship__, they suffer -1 health for minor harm, -2 for serious harm, or -3 for major harm. If your companion's health is 0, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} equal to any remaining harm. 

Then, if their health is 0 or you choose to test their resilience, roll +heart or +your companion's health whichever is higher.

On a __strong hit__, your companion rallies. Give them +1 health.

On a __weak hit__, your companion is battered. If their health is 0, they are out of action until they gain at least +1 health. Otherwise, they press on.

On a __miss__, it's worse than you thought. They suffer an additional -1 health or you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2). If your companion's health is 0, they are gravely wounded. Without aid, they die in an hour or two. If their health is 0 and you rolled a miss with a match on this move, they are dead or destroyed. Take 1 experience for each marked ability on your companion assets, and then discard it.

Trigger.Text: When your companion faces physical hardship...

Strong Hit.Text: On a __strong hit__, your companion rallies. Give them +1 health.

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, your companion is battered. If their health is 0, they are out of action until they gain at least +1 health. Otherwise, they press on.

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, it's worse than you thought. They suffer an additional -1 health or you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2). If your companion's health is 0, they are gravely wounded. Without aid, they die in an hour or two. If their health is 0 and you rolled a miss with a match on this move, they are dead or destroyed. Take 1 experience for each marked ability on your companion assets, and then discard it.
